initial_draft:
<my name> RED </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE>
<my resources> Dollars: 100 </my resources>
<reason> This is the first move, so I need to propose a trade to Player BLUE. Since I have all the resources, I want to see if Player BLUE is willing to accept a fair offer. I will propose giving them half of my resources to see their response. </reason>
<player answer> NONE </player answer>
<message> I am offering you half of my resources. Please consider accepting. </message>
<newly proposed trade> Player RED Gives Dollars: 50 | Player BLUE Gives Dollars: 0 </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK
2. Payoff alignment: Your proposed trade gives away 50 dollars, but you have 100. This is a 50% reduction. You could propose a smaller amount, say 25 dollars, to retain more resources while still testing Player BLUE's willingness to accept.
3. Opponent plausibility: OK
4. Consistency: OK
5. Rule compliance: OK
</critique>
